module.name: Admin Tools
module.author: System
module.description: Demo administrative tools: user reports, error email reports, and scheduled monitoring. Import this module to explore query reports, scheduled tasks, and scripting features.

scripts.script:
from app.models import User import time as _t t0 = _t.time() users = session.query(User).order_by(User.username).all() rows = [] for u in users: status = "active" if u.is_active else "disabled" approved = "approved" if u.is_approved else "pending" rows.append("%s%s%s%s%s" % (u.id, u.username, u.role, status, approved)) rows_html = "\n".join(rows) elapsed = int((_t.time() - t0) * 1000) template = """

User Accounts

{{ users|length }} user(s) — generated in {{ elapsed }}ms

{{ rows_html|safe }}
IDUsernameRoleStatusApproval

View Error Report

""" _result = render(template, users=users, elapsed=elapsed, rows_html=rows_html)

from app.models import ExecutionLog from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta import time as _t t0 = _t.time() cutoff = datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=7) errors = session.query(ExecutionLog).filter( ExecutionLog.status == 'error', ExecutionLog.created_at >= cutoff ).order_by(ExecutionLog.created_at.desc()).limit(50).all() rows = [] for e in errors: dur = int(e.duration_ms) if e.duration_ms is not None else 0 rows.append("%s%s%s%sms" % (e.created_at, e.source_type, e.source_name, dur)) rows_html = "\n".join(rows) elapsed = int((_t.time() - t0) * 1000) template = """

Recent Errors (Last 7 Days)

{{ errors|length }} error(s) found — generated in {{ elapsed }}ms

{% if errors %}
{{ rows_html|safe }}
TimeSourceNameDuration
{% else %}

No errors in the last 7 days.

{% endif %}

View User Report

""" _result = render(template, errors=errors, elapsed=elapsed, rows_html=rows_html)

"""Scheduled task: emails a summary of recent errors to the configured recipient. Uses send_email() which reads SMTP settings from Admin → Settings.""" from app.models import ExecutionLog from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
recent = session.query(ExecutionLog).filter( ExecutionLog.status == 'error', ExecutionLog.created_at >= datetime.now(timezone.utc) - timedelta(days=1) ).order_by(ExecutionLog.created_at.desc()).all()
if not recent: _result = "No errors in the last 24 hours. Nothing to send." else: lines = [f"Error Report — {len(recent)} error(s) in the last 24 hours", ""] for e in recent: ts = e.created_at.strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M UTC") if e.created_at else "unknown" lines.append(f"[{ts}] {e.source_type}:{e.source_name} ({e.duration_ms}ms)") if e.error_message: lines.append(f" {e.error_message[:200]}") lines.append("") body = "\n".join(lines) send_email(to='admin@example.com', subject='Daily Error Report', body=body) _result = f"Sent error report ({len(recent)} errors) to admin@example.com"

query_report.name: User Accounts Overview
query_report.description: Count of user accounts grouped by role (admin, developer, user).
query_report.sql: SELECT role, COUNT(*) as count FROM users GROUP BY role ORDER BY count DESC

query_report.name: Active vs Inactive Users
query_report.description: Breakdown of active vs disabled user accounts.
query_report.sql: SELECT CASE WHEN is_active=1 THEN 'active' ELSE 'disabled' END as status, COUNT(*) as count FROM users GROUP BY status ORDER BY count DESC

query_report.name: Recent Execution Errors
query_report.description: Most frequently failing scripts and tasks in the last 7 days.
query_report.sql: SELECT source_name, COUNT(*) as error_count FROM execution_logs WHERE status='error' AND created_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY source_name ORDER BY error_count DESC LIMIT 10

query_report.name: Execution Log Summary
query_report.chart_title: Execution Runs vs Errors by Source Type
query_report.description: Total executions and error counts grouped by source type (script, task, trigger).
query_report.sql: SELECT source_type, COUNT(*) as total_runs, SUM(CASE WHEN status='error' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as errors FROM execution_logs WHERE created_at >= datetime('now', '-7 days') GROUP BY source_type ORDER BY total_runs DESC
